sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ الْمَطْبَخُ الْعَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِ أَطْبَاقِهِ الشَّهِيَّةِ وَالْمَشْهُورَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska kuhinja se odlikuje raznolikošću svojih ukusnih i poznatih jela.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by its variety of delicious and famous dishes.

sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ "الْمَنْسَفُ" مِنَ الْأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ فِي بِلَادِ الشَّامِ، خَاصَّةً فِي الْأُرْدُنِ.
sentences.translation: 'Mansaf' se ubraja u tradicionalna jela u Levantu, posebno u Jordanu.
sentences.translationEn: 'Mansaf' is one of the traditional dishes in the Levant, especially in Jordan.

sentences.arabic: يَتَكَوَّنُ هَذَا الطَّبَقُ مِنَ اللَّحْمِ وَالْأُرْزِ وَاللَّبَنِ الْجَمِيدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo jelo se sastoji od mesa, riže i dehidriranog jogurta (džamida).
sentences.translationEn: This dish consists of meat, rice, and jameed (dried yogurt).

sentences.arabic: يَجْتَمِعُ أَفْرَادُ الْعَائِلَةِ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ لِتَنَاوُلِهِ فِي الْمُنَاسَبَاتِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Članovi porodice se okupljaju oko jedne trpeze kako bi ga jeli u sretnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: Family members gather around one table to eat it during happy occasions.
